title: The Ghoosebois Full Suite
description: This is the recommended Modpack for Ghoosebois Season 5. It includes both the mods required to be able to connect to the server and the clientside additions that help the game run smoothly and look better.
body:
Ghoosebois Season 5 is here! This time, the server aims to provide an exciting new modded experience that expands on the vanilla game that you know and love! The Ghoosebois Season 5 Modpack, or The Ghoosebois Full Suite, offers several client-side improvements that expand on the game without being overwhelming.

The modpack offers many new features, including from mods like Artifacts, Numismatic Overhaul, and Friends&Foes. It also seeks to transform many of the features that would be integrated into a server via unimmersive commands, such as teleportation or trading, into features within the game that feel more immersive and whole.


<details>
<summary>Featureful Mods</summary>
  These are all the mods included that add tangible content to the game.

  Warrior Rage
  
  Artifacts
  
  Combat Roll
  
  Friends&Foes
  
  Numismatic Overhaul
  
  Dye Depot
  
  Immersive Weathering

  Extra Alchemy
  
  Wraith Waystones
  
  Spirit Walker

  Diamond In The Rough

  Moyai
  
</details>

To join Ghoosebois Season 5, join the [Discord!](https://discord.gg/949bQc9kjW) Come join us on Ghoosebois Season 5!

Included is also a custom edit of Complimentary Reimagined that includes most of the modded blocks added in the modpack for the ultimate immersive experience! Support the original shaderpack [here!](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined)
